member.name: T:CheapHours.Api.Controllers.PowerController
member.summary: Endpoints for Danish electricity spot prices.

member.name: M:CheapHours.Api.Controllers.PowerController.GetToday(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all 24 hourly prices for today.

member.name: M:CheapHours.Api.Controllers.PowerController.GetTomorrow(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all 24 hourly prices for tomorrow (if published).

member.name: M:CheapHours.Api.Controllers.PowerController.GetCheapest(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the N cheapest individual hours, sorted ascending by price.

member.name: M:CheapHours.Api.Controllers.PowerController.GetBestWindow(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the cheapest contiguous block of N hours using a sliding window.

member.name: M:CheapHours.Api.Controllers.PowerController.GetSummary(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns price statistics: min, max, average, cheapest/most expensive hour, and hours below average.

member.name: T:CheapHours.Api.Models.BestWindow
member.summary: Represents the cheapest contiguous block of hours.

member.name: M:CheapHours.Api.Models.BestWindow.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Decimal,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{CheapHours.Api.Models.HourlyPrice})
member.summary: Represents the cheapest contiguous block of hours.

member.name: T:CheapHours.Api.Models.HourlyPrice
member.summary: Represents a single hour's electricity spot price.

member.name: M:CheapHours.Api.Models.HourlyPrice.#ctor(System.String,System.Decimal,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a single hour's electricity spot price.

member.name: T:CheapHours.Api.Models.PriceSummary
member.summary: Aggregated price statistics for a day.

member.name: M:CheapHours.Api.Models.PriceSummary.#ctor(System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,CheapHours.Api.Models.HourlyPrice,CheapHours.Api.Models.HourlyPrice,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Aggregated price statistics for a day.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
